positive: Minimalist, abstract forest scene rendered in the style of Art Nouveau woodcut illustration. A central grouping of stylized, interlocking foliage and whimsical woodland animals (e.g., deer, fox, owl) forming a circular wreath or crest. The composition must have a strong silhouette appeal, suitable for high-contrast textile printing. Use deep forest greens, muted moss tones, and antique charcoal blacks against a crisp off-white background. Include subtle metallic gold accents in the fine line work. Studio lighting, vector quality, highly detailed linework, symmetrical composition, full color, emblem design, forest biome concept art.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, watermark, grainy, fuzzy, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor quality, out of frame, signature
